title: masema dentatum
intro: Masema dentatum, commonly known as "Kalanchoe pinnata" or "Catharanthus pinnata", is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The therapeutic actions of Masema dentatum include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, making it effective in soothing pain and reducing inflammation. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
